activities_projects.title: Main Characters
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main characters in the story
steps: Read the lesson carefully
List the main characters in the story
Write one line about each character
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the characters in the story

activities_projects.title: Johnsy’s Illness
steps: Read the paragraph about Johnsy’s illness
Write 3–4 sentences about her condition
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the problem faced by Johnsy

activities_projects.title: Role of Sue
steps: Identify how Sue helps Johnsy
Write three points showing Sue’s kindness

activities_projects.title: The Ivy Creeper
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of the ivy leaves
steps: Read the part describing the ivy creeper
Write why the leaves are important to Johnsy

activities_projects.title: Behrman’s Dream
steps: Find the part where Behrman talks about his dream
Write 3 sentences about his dream

activities_projects.title: The Last Leaf
activities_projects.objective: Understand the significance of the last leaf
steps: Observe how the last leaf affects Johnsy
Write 3–4 sentences explaining its importance

activities_projects.title: Sequence of Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand the flow of the story
steps: Identify four main events in the story
Write them in the correct order

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary from the Lesson
steps: Select five difficult words from the lesson
Write their meanings and use them in sentences

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand the message of the story
steps: Think about the lesson learned from the story
Write the moral in 3–4 sentences

activities_projects.title: Importance of Hope
activities_projects.objective: Relate the story to real life
steps: Think about how hope helps people in difficult times
Write 3–4 sentences connecting it with the story
